_comment: Single source of truth for role-based, window-aware skill activation. Consumed by install.mjs (via scripts/resolve.mjs), scripts/build-plugins.mjs, and skill-router. A role's working set = its core set UNION its skills. 'pinned' skills stay auto-triggerable (skillOverrides: on) regardless of role/window when installed; everything else is gated: on with a 1m window OR when in the active role, else name-only. See docs/ROLES.md.

backend.label: Backend / Full-stack Engineer
backend.description: Skills for service, API, and data work: design, test-first implementation, performance, and shipping.

frontend.label: Frontend Engineer
frontend.description: Skills for UI/UX, component architecture, accessibility, and client-side performance.

devops.label: DevOps / SRE / Platform Engineer
devops.description: Skills for CI/CD, containers, infrastructure-as-code, delivery, observability, and incidents.

ml.label: ML Engineer / MLOps
ml.description: Skills for ML pipelines, experiment tracking, evaluation, model deployment, and the data/observability around them.

ai.label: AI Engineer
ai.description: Skills for LLM-powered applications: prompt/RAG/agent design, evaluation, experiment tracking, model deployment, and the API around them.

data.label: Data Engineer
data.description: Skills for data pipelines, analytics engineering, data quality/contracts, schema design, test data, and pipeline observability.

data-scientist.label: Data Scientist
data-scientist.description: Skills for exploratory data analysis, statistical rigor, notebook productionization, and the experiment-tracking/data-quality/modeling work around them.

security.label: Security Engineer
security.description: Skills for design-time threat modeling, security audits, dependency/CVE management, blast-radius analysis, and incident handling.

architect.label: Architect / Staff Engineer
architect.description: Skills for structural decisions, documentation, contracts, blast radius, and technical-debt strategy.

em.label: Engineering Manager / Tech Lead
em.description: Skills for planning, estimation, metrics, retros, proposals, reviews, and steering reviews and incidents.

pm.label: Product / Project Manager
pm.description: Skills for proposals, PRDs/specs, estimation, OKRs/metrics, retrospectives, and strategic reviews.

strategy.label: Strategy / Founder Review
strategy.description: Skills for pre-public and strategic reviews: vision and positioning, market analysis, build-vs-buy decisions, execution-vs-roadmap, and go/no-go synthesis.

qa.label: QA / Test Engineer
qa.description: Skills for test-first development, coverage strategy, test data, review, and systematic debugging.

mobile.label: Mobile Engineer
mobile.description: Skills for native and cross-platform mobile apps: architecture, offline/sync, UI/UX, accessibility, performance, API contracts, and app-store releases.

designer.label: Designer / UX
designer.description: Skills for user flows, accessibility, product requirements, and the frontend architecture that realizes them.
